description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a modern suburban design, featuring a dark multi-gabled roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The facade includes large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. A double garage with white paneled doors is integrated into the right side of the house, adjacent to a paved driveway. The property is enclosed by a low stone or concrete wall, with a small landscaped yard and a tree visible on one side. The main entryway is sheltered by a roofed porch, and the overall structure is robust and spacious, suitable for a family residence. The exterior materials and landscaping suggest a comfortable, middle-to-upper class urban neighborhood setting.
description: A two-story brick house with a dark gabled roof, large symmetrical windows, a double garage, and a covered front porch, surrounded by a low wall and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, double garage, symmetrical windows, and landscaped yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended brick wall, large side windows, and the continuation of the low boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the garage, fewer windows, and a tree partially obscuring the right side.
description_view_3: Right side view with the porch roof, side windows, and a tree near the boundary wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, single main door, and a paved approach
